description: Composition Printed beige sheer shirt made of a blended satin fabric, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket with wooden buttons, long sleeves with double buttoned cuffs and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Dry inside out Do not bleach or wring Warm iron Strikingly chic, reminiscent of a vintage vibe, this flowy shirt from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Pared down to the basics, with a draped, clingy silhouette, pair this with a pencil skirt and matching tights. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
